jason_swett.name: Jason Swett
jason_swett.title: Testing Expert
jason_swett.dialogBefore:
I am feeling a little
blocked. Maybe a code review
will loosen things up
a bit.
jason_swett.dialogAfter:
Your tests are green across
the board. Excuse me I need
to make a run for
the bathroom.

greg_molnar.name: Greg Molnar
greg_molnar.title: Security Specialist
greg_molnar.dialogBefore:
Security isn't a feature.
It's a responsibility.
Let's see if your gems can
survive these security bugs.
greg_molnar.dialogAfter:
Your defenses are solid.
Take the Security Pass.
Keep your apps safe out there.

nate_berkopec.name: Nate Berkopec
nate_berkopec.title: Performance Engineer
nate_berkopec.dialogBefore:
Every millisecond matters.
If your app isn't fast,
your users are gone.
Can your gems squash
these performance bugs?
nate_berkopec.dialogAfter:
Fast and efficient.
You've earned the Speed Pass.
Now make it even faster.

dhh.name: DHH
dhh.title: Rails Creator
dhh.dialogBefore:
You've made it to the launch pad.
But the rocket only has room
for real Rails developers.
Let's see if your gems can
handle the nastiest bugs.
dhh.dialogAfter:
Welcome aboard.
Take the Captain's Pass.
The rocket is waiting.
See you in space!
